name: Brent Crude
summary: Day 67. BRENT $113.48 INTRADAY (Tue May 5 11:23 IST, -0.8% 1D give-back from $114.44 Mon May 4 close which was +5.80%) — 3-DAY ROUND-TRIP after kinetic restart: May 1 close $108.17 (Iran 14-point pricing) → May 4 close $114.44 (Trump rejection + Iran multi-axis kinetic) → Tue intraday $113.48. The $115-sustained-2-session trigger remains RESOLVED-NO; sub-$115 chain extended to Day 3 of 5 (Apr 30 $110.40 + May 1 $108.17 + May 4 $114.44 — ALL <$115) but directional momentum INVERTED. Cross-asset adjudication: VIX +7.7% to 18.29; USD/INR record ₹95.34 (+0.5% Tue, Day 2 sustained); S&P -0.41% off May 1 record close; Apple held flat $280.14; KOSPI +5.1% record DECOUPLED; Linde -2.8% (helium-rotation thesis FAILED); CF Industries +2.6% (fertilizer war-bid); Wheat/Corn/Sugar +2.3-3.0%. Operational reality: Project Freedom convoy operational; 2 US destroyers transited Hormuz under armed escort; Iran exports still 567K bpd (-73% pre-blockade per Kpler); UAE Fujairah Oil Industry Zone hit (Abu Dhabi pipeline = bypass infrastructure). RISK PREMIUM RE-RATE move, not SUPPLY DISRUPTION (Project Freedom WORKING — armed transit successful). Tue give-back of $1 is cleanest signal markets pricing kinetic-restart as continuation of contested-blockade equilibrium, NOT regime change. Forward path: $110-115 hold = contested equilibrium; >$118 sustained = kinetic intensification priced; <$108 = de-escalation possibility re-priced.
